creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

We will not be fixing this for the 6_ branch, since that would break the 
current tradition that RELENG_6 uses which is still /usr/X11R6, in later 
revisions this had been fixed (e.g. RELENG_7), please see 
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/src/etc/defaults/rc.conf.diff?r1=1.314;r2=1.315 
for the information and the changelog for revision 1.315, thanks for the 
submission though!
